title: neomammillaria pyrrhocephala
intro: Neomammillaria pyrrhocephala, also known as the red crested mammillaria, is a species of cactus native to Mexico. The red crested mammillaria is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the red crested mammillaria is prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and can also be dried and used in teas or as a powder for various herbal preparations.
